meaning: n.活动性,灵活性,迁移率,机动性
examples: Recent years have witnessed a growing social mobility.
Prior to the nineteenth century, there were almost no channels of social mobility.
It represented upward social and financial mobility.
The LG Optimus L5 is now available from both Bell Mobility and Virgin Mobile in Canada.
No-cost mobility reduces social isolation and provides a lifeline to vital social services for older Londoners.
